title: Signedness handling in binary bitwise operations of constants

features.name: bitwise OR of signed constants with signedness propagation
features.description: Code should include a bitwise OR operation between two signed constant literals where the result is used in a signed context

features.name: signed constant literal in bitwise expression
features.description: Code should include a signed constant literal in a bitwise binary operation

features.name: comparison with signed bitwise result
features.description: Code should include a comparison between a signed variable and the result of a bitwise OR between signed constants
